title: Shri Vaishnavi Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Vaishnavi Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Vaishnavi.
description:
Jai Vaishnavi Mata,
Maiya Jai Vaishnavi Mata.
Haath jod tere aage,
Aarti main gaata॥
॥ Jai Vaishnavi Mata ॥

Sheesh pe chhatra viraje,
Murtiya pyari.
Ganga behti charnan,
Jyoti jage nyari॥
॥ Jai Vaishnavi Mata ॥

Brahma ved padhe nit dware,
Shankar dhyan dhare.
Sevak chanwar dulavat,
Narad nritya kare॥
॥ Jai Vaishnavi Mata ॥

Sundar gufa tumhari,
Man ko ati bhaave.
Baar-baar dekhan ko,
Ae maa man chaave॥
॥ Jai Vaishnavi Mata ॥

Bhavan pe jhande jhule,
Ghanta dhwani baaje.
Uncha parvat tera,
Mata priya laage॥
॥ Jai Vaishnavi Mata ॥

Paan supari dhwaja nariyal,
Bhent pushp meva.
Daas khade charno mein,
Darshan do deva॥
॥ Jai Vaishnavi Mata ॥

Jo jan nishchay karke,
Dwar tere aave.
Uski ichha puran,
Mata ho jaave॥
॥ Jai Vaishnavi Mata ॥

Itni stuti nish-din,
Jo nar bhi gaave.
Kehte sevak Dhyanu,
Sukh sampatti paave॥
॥ Jai Vaishnavi Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Vaishnavi Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed for the fulfillment of wishes and divine protection.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Vaishnavi Mata?
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for the Mother?
faq.q4: Can the Mother's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, you can perform the Aarti with devotion in front of her picture.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti?
faq.a5: One should chant 'Jai Mata Di' and recite the Mother's Stuti.
